　　梁济宁x谢游

　　大宣第一纨绔兼笑面虎心眼八百个不止但总体阳光开朗受X多副面孔实力派演员超能学习但总体对外清冷疏离对内恋爱脑攻
第二版简介·庆元帝视角
我是庆元帝，大宣的帝王。
论有一个外家是开国元勋，五代单传，世代报国，帮皇家镇守西北的忠臣，娘还是他喜欢的人的儿子怎么办？
不管怎么办，为了边疆稳定，那必须得狠狠宠，往死里宠才行啊……
要星星不给月亮的那种。
不管是真宠假宠，那样子必须得做到位才行。
起初他总是担心这儿子长大以后会忍不住夺权，毕竟外家宣武侯府的实力不是开玩笑的。
直到后来这小子干出在书上画王八，上课天天迟到，每天钓鱼执法……
他才悟了。
这小子天生就是来克他的！
还夺嫡，这逆子能在长到十五，干出件像样的事，他好给他封王离京前不气死他就算大孝子了。
夺嫡，呵，这逆子智商够吗他！
在他以为逆子每次干出一件刷新他下线的事的时候，他以为到头了。但总会又有下一件更炸裂的事情向他的下线发起攻击……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/01eaf1875fc9bc138d0ea418a51bebbe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"二分之三","author_id":"","book_id":"7578189762360527897","book_name":"皇帝，你最宠的儿子是GAY","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#780000","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7578851480065557017","read_count":"23103","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"408468"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"170","tags":"双男主,穿越,古代,基建,群像,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/01eaf1875fc9bc138d0ea418a51bebbe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361276&x-signature=o28XdVMqVkoCnIjQD8mHCiKPC64%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1579360078532904","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"139"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322190116123B47095B595B9C0EB7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评
